control.description-key: Beta Testing - Latest features including Driving Mode, Adaptive Cards, Voice (Azure + OpenAI), Attachments, Language Selection, and Admin Mode

property.name: DirectLineSecret
property.description-key: 🔐 SENSITIVE - Direct Line Secret from Copilot Studio. Recommend using Environment Variables for production.

property.name: SpeechKey
property.description-key: 🔐 SENSITIVE - Azure Speech Service Key. Recommend using Environment Variables for production.

property.name: OpenAIEndpoint
property.description-key: Azure OpenAI Endpoint for TTS (e.g., https://your-resource.openai.azure.com/)

property.name: OpenAIKey
property.description-key: 🔐 SENSITIVE - Azure OpenAI API Key for TTS. Recommend using Environment Variables for production.

property.name: OpenAIDeployment
property.description-key: Azure OpenAI TTS Deployment Name (default: tts)

property.name: SpeechProxyEndpoint
property.description-key: Azure Function speech proxy URL for managed identity auth (e.g., https://func-speech-proxy.azurewebsites.net). Provides /api/azure-tts and /api/openai-tts endpoints.

property.name: SpeechProxyApiKey
property.description-key: 🔐 SENSITIVE - API key for the speech proxy Azure Function. Recommend using Environment Variables for production.

property.name: ModalTitle
property.description-key: Title displayed on the Driving Mode modal (default: Copilot Assistant)

property.name: EnableAttachments
property.description-key: Enable file and photo attachments (default: No)

property.name: AttachmentIcon
property.description-key: Icon style for attachment button (paperclip, camera, document, plus)

property.name: DefaultLanguage
property.description-key: Default language for speech recognition and synthesis (e.g., en-US, es-CO, es-MX, fr-FR). Leave empty for auto-detection from browser.
